name: Crickhowell to Table Mountain & Crug Mawr
terrain: Field paths, open hill, minor road
highlights: Extended Table Mountain loop adding Crug Mawr summit (550m).
points_of_interest: Crickhowell Castle motte; Iron Age Crug Hywel hillfort; Ty Mawr standing stones
viewpoints: Sugar Loaf; Skirrid; Usk Valley sweep; Black Mountains horseshoe
food_drink_nearby: The Bear Hotel; Cafe Cwtch; Dragon Inn; Bay Tree
